properties.name: never-synced
properties.description: Board has never had a successful sync run; lastSyncedAt is null in meta.

properties.name: dirty
properties.description: Board was previously synced but current content hash differs from contentHashAtLastSync — unsynced edits exist.

properties.name: synced
properties.description: Board content hash matches contentHashAtLastSync — the graph reflects the current board state exactly.

properties.name: queued
properties.description: Run has been accepted by the queue and recorded in the ring-buffer; skill execution not yet started.

properties.name: running
properties.description: Skill invocation is actively executing (pinch task in flight or local renderer active).

properties.name: blocked
properties.description: Run is paused because the itsalt-pinch pacer has reached its global concurrency cap; will retry after msUntilRetry.

properties.name: completed
properties.description: Skill invocation finished with exitCode 0; board meta has been updated.

properties.name: failed
properties.description: Skill invocation finished with non-zero exitCode or the process threw an unhandled error.

properties.name: running
properties.description: Batch is actively executing; at least one run remains in the queue; currentRunId is non-null.

properties.name: done
properties.description: All scheduled runs have reached completed or failed; batch loop exited normally; currentRunId is null.
